name: BBA in Data Analytics
description: Bachelor of Business Administration with specialization in data analytics. Covers SQL, statistics, business intelligence, data visualization, and analytics-driven decision making.

name: BBA in Digital Marketing
description: BBA focused on digital marketing strategy, performance advertising, brand, content, and marketing analytics.

name: BBA in FinTech
description: BBA combining finance fundamentals with payments, blockchain basics, and fintech product strategy.

name: MBA in AI for Business
description: MBA with concentration in AI strategy, applied ML for business problems, and organizational adoption of AI.

name: MBA in Advanced Management
description: Generalist MBA emphasizing leadership, operations, and strategy across functions.

name: Certificate in Product Management
description: Short professional certificate in product management fundamentals: discovery, prioritization, delivery, metrics.
